title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zomato Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Zomato Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Zomato Digital Technologies:
Zomato Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Digital Technologies!
